title: FCEL Stock Earnings: FuelCell Energy Beats EPS, Misses Revenue for Q4 2023
text: FuelCell Energy Q4 2023 (ended Oct 31, 2023) earnings per share was $(0.07), beating analyst expectations of $(0.08). Revenue was $22.46 million, falling short of analyst estimates by 10.76% (expected $25.17 million). FuelCell Energy delivered mixed results in Q4 2023 earnings report. While company exceeded EPS projections, it underperformed on the top line, generating significantly less revenue than Wall Street anticipated. Q4 2023 results: revenues of $22.5 million compared to $39.2 million in Q4 2022, a 43% decrease driven primarily by lack of replacement module sales. Net loss was $29.5 million vs net loss of $42 million in Q4 2022. Net loss per share of $(0.07) compared to $(0.11) in Q4 2022. Adjusted EBITDA totaled $(30.8) million vs $(36.1) million in Q4 2022. Strategic highlights: fourth quarter and full year results marked important progress on large projects, continued advancement of solid oxide power generation and electrolysis hydrogen platforms, and work with Idaho National Laboratory and EDF Energy demonstrating differentiated value of FCEL solid oxide electrolysis technology in nuclear applications.
